prompt: Write a 300-word affiliate program spec for openpatent.ai. Cover: (1) the 4 commission tiers — (a) Starter-affiliate (sign-up only, no audit, 15% on first $5k customer spend, cookie 30 days), (b) Pro-affiliate (audited content + 1 disclosure demo, 25% on first $25k, cookie 60 days), (c) Elite-affiliate (audited YouTube channel / newsletter with >5k subs, 35% on first $50k, cookie 90 days, custom landing page), (d) Sovereign-affiliate (audited podcast / conference circuit, 45% on first $100k, lifetime cookie, white-label disclosure portal, co-branded quarterly report), (2) the 4 verticals — IP law podcasts (IP Fridays, The IP Podcast, 2 weird 1 IP), AI engineering newsletters (AI Breakfast, TLDR AI, Latent Space), indie-hacker communities (IndieHackers, MicroConf), patent-attorney continuing-ed, (3) the tooling — Partnerstack for tracking + payouts, Rewardful for SaaS-specific features, custom UTM convention, (4) the payout — NET-30, PayPal/Wise/USDC, min payout $50, (5) the 4 anti-fraud rules — no self-referral, no brand-bidding on 'openpatent', no misleading claims about Bitcoin OTS legal status, no spam, (6) the 90-day target — 250 affiliates signed, $180k affiliate-sourced ARR. Use DEFENEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {commission_tiers:[4 strings], verticals:[4 strings], tooling:[2 strings], payout:string, anti_fraud_rules:[4 strings], day_90_targets:[2 strings]}.
